notes:
Fixed

  • 1-to-1 Calls: Video and audio connections now work reliably, even behind firewalls.
  • Call Setup: The "Waiting..." animation now shows correctly when calling someone.
  • Call Connectivity: Fixed an issue where calls could fail to connect in the production app.

Improved

  • Group Calls: A "Connecting..." indicator now appears while other participants' video is loading.
  • Error Tracking: More detailed error reports are now sent to our monitoring system for faster debugging.
